_metadata.title: Testing of high-risk AI systems in real world conditions outside AI regulatory sandboxes

obligations.source_quote: Providers or prospective providers may conduct the testing in real world conditions only where all of the following conditions are met: (a) the provider or prospective provider has drawn up a real-world testing plan and submitted it to the market surveillance authority in the Member State where the testing in real world conditions is to be conducted;
obligations.addressee_note: Provider or prospective provider conducting real-world testing of Annex III high-risk AI systems

decomposed_atoms.description: A real-world testing plan must be prepared
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL draw up a real-world testing plan

decomposed_atoms.description: Testing plan must be submitted to the market surveillance authority
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL submit the testing plan to the market surveillance authority in the Member State where testing is to be conducted

decomposed_atoms.description: Market surveillance authority must approve the testing plan
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The market surveillance authority SHALL have approved the testing in real world conditions and the real-world testing plan

decomposed_atoms.description: Testing must be registered in EU database with unique ID
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL register the testing in real world conditions with a Union-wide unique single identification number

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider must be established in the Union or have appointed a legal representative
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL be established in the Union or have appointed a legal representative who is established in the Union

decomposed_atoms.description: Data collected for testing transferred to third countries only with appropriate safeguards
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Data SHALL be transferred to third countries only with appropriate and applicable safeguards under Union law

decomposed_atoms.description: Testing must not last longer than necessary, max 6 months (extendable by 6 months with notice)
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Testing SHALL not last longer than necessary and in any case not longer than six months, extendable for an additional six months with prior notification

decomposed_atoms.description: Test subjects from vulnerable groups must be appropriately protected
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Subjects belonging to vulnerable groups due to age or disability SHALL be appropriately protected

decomposed_atoms.description: Deployers participating in testing must be informed and given instructions
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Deployers or prospective deployers SHALL be informed of all relevant aspects and given relevant instructions for use per Art. 13

decomposed_atoms.description: Test subjects must give informed consent per Art. 61
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Subjects SHALL have given informed consent in accordance with Art. 61

decomposed_atoms.description: Testing must be effectively overseen by qualified persons
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Testing SHALL be effectively overseen by suitably qualified persons with necessary capacity, training, and authority

decomposed_atoms.description: AI system predictions/recommendations must be reversible and disregardable
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Predictions, recommendations, or decisions of the AI system SHALL be effectively reversible and disregardable

obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to testing of Annex III high-risk AI systems in real world conditions outside regulatory sandboxes

obligations.source_quote: Any serious incident identified in the course of the testing in real world conditions shall be reported to the national market surveillance authority in accordance with Article 73. The provider or prospective provider shall adopt immediate mitigation measures or, failing that, shall suspend the testing in real world conditions until such mitigation takes place, or otherwise terminate it. The provider or prospective provider shall establish a procedure for the prompt recall of the AI system upon such termination of the testing in real world conditions.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider or prospective provider conducting real-world testing

decomposed_atoms.description: Serious incidents during testing must be reported per Art. 73
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Any serious incident SHALL be reported to the national market surveillance authority in accordance with Art. 73

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider must immediately mitigate or suspend testing upon serious incident
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL adopt immediate mitigation measures or suspend the testing until mitigation takes place, or terminate it

decomposed_atoms.description: A prompt recall procedure must be established for testing termination
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL establish a procedure for the prompt recall of the AI system upon termination of testing

obligations.source_quote: Providers or prospective providers shall notify the national market surveillance authority in the Member State where the testing in real world conditions is to be conducted of the suspension or termination of the testing in real world conditions and of the final outcomes.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider or prospective provider conducting real-world testing

decomposed_atoms.description: Authority must be notified of testing suspension or termination
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL notify the market surveillance authority of suspension or termination of testing

decomposed_atoms.description: Final outcomes of testing must be reported to the authority
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL notify the market surveillance authority of the final outcomes of testing

obligations.source_quote: The provider or prospective provider shall be liable under applicable Union and national liability law for any damage caused in the course of their testing in real world conditions.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider or prospective provider conducting real-world testing

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider is liable for any damage caused during testing
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL be liable under applicable Union and national liability law for any damage caused in the course of their testing in real world conditions
